rationale.R1.7: The delegation is exclusively 'Check the citations' — verifying bibliographic accuracy (Hageman & Young 1981, Anderson et al. 1992, Saad 2003), proper attribution of claims to those sources, and coverage of relevant literature is the entire task; failure here directly invalidates the delegation.
rationale.R1.3: Peripheral: citation checking naturally grazes whether each cited work actually supports the specific claim it is attached to (e.g., whether Saad 2003 really formalises the preconditioner families asserted), but full evidence-claim audit of experimental results is not requested.
